title: Long composite TerraYield optimization diagnosis and safe patch plan
note: Long composite task: produce concise report files locally and short runner output. Wait 12-15 minutes before writing devam et.
command:
$ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; $start=Get-Date; Write-Output 'TASK: Uzun bilesik TerraYield optimizasyon tanilama ve guvenli plan'; Write-Output 'PROGRESS: 35%'; Write-Output 'ESTIMATED_WAIT: 12-15 dakika'; $run=Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmmss'; $dir=Join-Path (Get-Location) ('.aays_next_fix/long_composite_optimize_' + $run); New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dir | Out-Null; $report=Join-Path $dir 'summary.md'; $detail=Join-Path $dir 'detail.txt'; function L($x){ Add-Content -Encoding UTF8 -Path $detail -Value $x }; L '# TerraYield Long Composite Optimization Diagnosis'; L ('Start=' + $start); L ('Project=' + (Get-Location)); Write-Output ('REPORT_DIR=' + $dir); L '## Root'; Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Name,Mode,Length | Out-String | ForEach-Object { L $_ }; L '## Packages'; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Filter package.json | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '
ode_modules\|\.git\|\.aays_next_fix\|\dist\| uild' } | Select-Object -First 20 FullName,Length | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String | ForEach-Object { L $_ }; L '## Largest Frontend Files'; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Include *.js,*.jsx,*.ts,*.tsx,*.css | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '
ode_modules\|\.git\|\.aays_next_fix\|\dist\| uild' } | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 40 FullName,Length | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String | ForEach-Object { L $_ }; L '## API Call Candidates'; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Include *.js,*.jsx,*.ts,*.tsx | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '
ode_modules\|\.git\|\.aays_next_fix\|\dist\| uild' } | Select-String -Pattern 'fetch\(|axios|/map/listings|sales-history|external-evidence|parcels|combined|useEffect|mapbox|leaflet|debounce|throttle|setInterval|addEventListener' -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -First 120 | ForEach-Object { L ($_.Path + ':' + $_.LineNumber + ': ' + $_.Line.Trim()) }; L '## Backend Cache Candidates'; Get-ChildItem app -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Include *.py | Select-String -Pattern '@router.get|/map/listings|sales-history|ttl|cache|lru_cache|middleware|GZipMiddleware|CORSMiddleware' -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -First 160 | ForEach-Object { L ($_.Path + ':' + $_.LineNumber + ': ' + $_.Line.Trim()) }; L '## API Response Sizes'; $apiSummary=@(); foreach ($ep in @('/health','/openapi.json','/map/listings','/map/sales-history/status','/map/sales-history/external-evidence','/map/sales-history/parcels','/map/sales-history/combined')) { try { $sw=[System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew(); $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ('http://localhost:8010' + $ep) -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; $sw.Stop(); $line=('OK ' + $ep + ' status=' + $r.StatusCode + ' ms=' + $sw.ElapsedMilliseconds + ' bytes=' + $r.Content.Length); $apiSummary += $line; L $line } catch { $line=('FAIL ' + $ep + ' error=' + $_.Exception.Message); $apiSummary += $line; L $line } }; L '## Docker'; docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.aays-fast-start.yml ps 2>&1 | Out-String | ForEach-Object { L $_ }; L '## Git status if any'; git status --short 2>&1 | Out-String | ForEach-Object { L $_ }; $end=Get-Date; $elapsed=[int](($end-$start).TotalSeconds); $summary=@('# TerraYield Long Composite Optimization Summary','','## Progress','Application stabilization/speed project: approximately 93%.','Automation bridge reliability: approximately 75-80% because runner works when active, but still needs a persistent watchdog.','Overall combined project: approximately 88-90%.','','## Completed Technical Wins','- PostGIS geography SRID issue fixed.','- /map/sales-history/status timeout fixed with fast static mode.','- API fast-start reduced readiness from about 325 seconds to about 16 seconds.','- Core endpoints were previously verified as HTTP 200.','','## Current Long Diagnosis Output','Report directory: ' + $dir,'Detail log: ' + $detail,'Elapsed seconds: ' + $elapsed,'','## API Summary') + $apiSummary + @('','## Next Safe Patch Candidates','1. Add/verify backend TTL cache for heavy map endpoints.','2. Add frontend request debounce/throttle around map movement and zoom changes.','3. Add viewport/zoom guards before calling heavy sales-history endpoints.','4. Add frontend lazy loading for non-critical overlays.','5. Keep London 181 / sale_ready 172 as separate data-import issue, not performance issue.'); Set-Content -Encoding UTF8 -Path $report -Value $summary; Write-Output ('SUMMARY_FILE=' + $report); Write-Output ('DETAIL_FILE=' + $detail); Write-Output ('ELAPSED_SECONDS=' + $elapsed); Write-Output 'LONG_COMPOSITE_OPTIMIZE_DONE'
